Description: You turn a creature's own power against it. Make a melee attack roll using your MOVE power. On a hit, the target takes dark damage equal to the target's level + the corresponding dice according to the user's level.
Scaling: Higher Levels: The damage dice roll for this move changes to 2d10 at level 5, 3d10 at level 10, and 4d12 at level 17.
